violations.text: Monkey Balls packaged (in cups) in the food establishment are lacking labels affixed to the cup/container (sign on cooler door). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients and allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Per the PIC, labels to be ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 03/16/2026
